summary: Conversion Intelligence feature fully tested. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All features working including filters, 3 tabs (Stage Funnel, Deal Velocity, Revenue Forecast), CSV export, and empty state handling.

issues: Console hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - React rendering warning in transitions table. Does not affect functionality but should be reviewed for production.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend service uses proper date filtering with date_range parameter (7/30/90 days) and custom start_date/end_date
Filter options endpoint correctly returns cities array and RMs with user_id, name, email fields
Export endpoint correctly flattens lead data for CSV with all required fields
Frontend correctly displays Stage Funnel with visual bar chart and conversion rates
Leak Point detection working - correctly identifies biggest drop-off stage and highlights in UI
Deal Velocity tab shows avg/median times and SLA status (OK/EXCEEDED) per stage
Revenue Forecast correctly shows pipeline value, weighted GMV, weighted commission using stage probability weights
All filters (date range, city, RM) work correctly and update data in real-time
CSV Export downloads file with correct naming convention: conversion_intelligence_YYYY-MM-DD.csv
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing leads data across 4 cities (Delhi, Mumbai, Gurgaon, Pune) and 4 RMs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Conversion Intelligence feature at /admin/conversion-intelligence fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence (main data with filters), GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence/filters (filter options), GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence/export (CSV data). Frontend has 3 tabs: Stage Funnel (with Leak Point alert), Deal Velocity (with SLA status), Revenue Forecast (with stage probability weights). All data-testid attributes present: toggle-filters-btn, filters-panel, date-range-select, city-filter-select, rm-filter-select, export-csv-btn, refresh-btn, tab-funnel, tab-velocity, tab-forecast, summary-cards, metric-total-leads, metric-conversion, leak-point-alert, funnel-chart, transitions-table, velocity-summary, velocity-chart, velocity-table, forecast-summary, stage-weights-info, pipeline-chart, pipeline-table.

GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence.returns: drop_off (transitions, funnel, leak_point, overall_conversion), velocity (stage_velocity, sla_config), forecast (pipeline_value, weighted_gmv, stage_pipeline, stage_weights)

GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence/f.returns: cities array, rms array with user_id/name/email

GET /api/admin/conversion-intelligence/e.returns: Array of flattened lead data for CSV

features: Stage-to-Stage Conversion table with LEAK POINT badge
Velocity summary cards (Avg Time to Contact, Avg Time to Close, Deals Tracked, Payment to Confirm)
Stage Velocity Details table with SLA thresholds and OK/EXCEEDED status
Total Pipeline, Weighted GMV, Weighted Commission, Confirmed This Month cards
Stage Probability Weights info with badges (New: 5%, Contacted: 10%, etc.)
Pipeline Value by Stage bar chart
Pipeline Breakdown table with leads count, total value, weight %, weighted value
